series_metadata.series_description: Contract Encumbrances, Procurements, Complaints to Vendors, and Related Contract Documents

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: For sale of goods, retain 5 years after contract expires, then destroy. For services, retain 16 years, then destroy ; Paper: For sale of goods, retain 5 years after contract expires, then destroy. For services, retain 16 years, then destroy, Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Trash
